title: High-risk complaint-heavy customer
top_reasons: short tenure suggests the customer is still early in the lifecycle
higher monthly charges can increase price sensitivity
retention_action: Offer a billing review, clarify charges, and test an autopay or plan-fit incentive.
business_summary: Customer is in the high churn-risk band at 84.3%. Primary signals: short tenure suggests the customer is still early in the lifecycle; month-to-month contract increases churn risk. Recommended action: Offer a billing review, clarify charges, and test an autopay or plan-fit incentive.

title: Medium-risk onboarding customer
top_reasons: short tenure suggests the customer is still early in the lifecycle
low engagement suggests weak product stickiness
retention_action: Offer a billing review, clarify charges, and test an autopay or plan-fit incentive.
business_summary: Customer is in the medium churn-risk band at 64.9%. Primary signals: short tenure suggests the customer is still early in the lifecycle; month-to-month contract increases churn risk. Recommended action: Offer a billing review, clarify charges, and test an autopay or plan-fit incentive.

title: Low-risk stable customer
top_reasons: pricing profile is not heavily pressuring retention
retention_action: Maintain standard engagement with a routine health-check and renewal reminder.
business_summary: Customer is in the low churn-risk band at 0.2%. Primary signals: longer tenure is helping retention; contract structure is helping retention. Recommended action: Maintain standard engagement with a routine health-check and renewal reminder.
